title: Sisa Dukashe Stadium
address: Sisa Dukashe Stadium, Mdantsane, Eastern Cape, 5201
description: A multi-purpose stadium famous for soccer, rugby, and boxing events. Home to numerous national and international boxing champions.

title: Cecilia Makiwane Hospital
address: Cecilia Makiwane Hospital, Buffalo Road, Mdantsane, Eastern Cape, 5201
description: Major district hospital providing healthcare services to Mdantsane and surrounding communities. Named after South Africa's first Black professional nurse.

title: Egerton Railway Station Massacre Memorial
description: A memorial site honoring the victims of the 1983 bus boycott massacre, an important historical landmark in Mdantsane.

title: Mdantsane City Mall
address: Mdantsane City Mall, King William's Town Road, Mdantsane, Eastern Cape, 5201
description: A central shopping mall with retail stores, restaurants, and services, serving as a hub for the local community.

title: Mdantsane Library
description: Located in the heart of the township, offers a range of services including internet access, book lending, and educational programs.

title: Duncan Village Massacre Statue
address: Duncan Village Memorial, Mdantsane, Eastern Cape, 5201
description: A poignant statue commemorating those who lost their lives during the 1985 Duncan Village massacre. A place for reflection and remembrance.

title: Indoor Sports Center
description: The Mdantsane Indoor Sports Centre provides modern sporting facilities to the community.

title: Mdantsane Correctional Centre (Fort Jackson Prison)
address: NU 13 Golden Highway St, Fort Jackson, Mdantsane
description: The Mdantsane Correctional Centre, commonly known as Fort Jackson Prison, is a correctional facility located in Mdantsane. It houses both juvenile and adult offenders and plays a role in the region's criminal justice system.
